%% Procedure to obtain "Fine Tea, Full Moon" in Genshin Impact
flowchart TD
    A["Check Event Availability for "Fine Tea, Full Moon" (-> Genshin Impact event)"] --> B["Participate in the Event Quests"]
    B --> C["Unlock the Recipe for "Fine Tea, Full Moon""]
    C -->|"recipe for "Fine Tea, Full Moon""| D["Learn the Recipe"]
    D -->|"learned recipe for "Fine Tea, Full Moon""| E["Gather Ingredients: Tea Leaves, Sugar, Lotus Head, Milk"]
    E -->|"ingredients: Tea Leaves, Sugar, Lotus Head, Milk"| F["Cook the Dish "Fine Tea, Full Moon" at a Cooking Station"]

%% Procedure to reach the Nether in Minecraft by building a Nether Portal
flowchart TD
    A["Step 1: Gather Basic Resources
- Wood
- Crafting table
- Wooden pickaxe"] -->|"wooden pickaxe"| B["Step 2: Mine for Stone and Iron
- Collect cobblestone (17)
- Collect iron ore (>=3)"]
    B -->|"cobblestone (17)"| C["Step 3: Smelt Iron
- Craft furnace
- Smelt iron ore into iron ingots (>=3)"]
    B -->|"iron ore (>=3)"| C
    C -->|"iron ingots (>=3)"| D["Step 4: Collect Water and Lava
- Craft bucket
- Collect water
- Find lava pool"]
    D -->|"water bucket, lava pool"| E["Step 5: Create Obsidian
- Pour water on lava source blocks
- (Optionally) use alternative non-mining method later"]
    
    %% Main path: building portal without mining obsidian
    E -->|"obsidian blocks formed via water + lava"| F["Step 6: Build Nether Portal without Mining Obsidian
- Create mold
- Place lava with bucket
- Pour water to form obsidian in frame shape (10 blocks)"]
    
    %% Flint and steel
    C -->|"remaining iron ingot(s)"| G["Step 7: Prepare Flint and Steel
- Mine gravel for flint
- Use 1 iron ingot + 1 flint to craft flint and steel"]
    F -->|"completed obsidian portal frame"| H["Step 7: Activate the Nether Portal
- Use flint and steel to ignite bottom obsidian block"]
    G -->|"flint and steel"| H
    
    %% Optional diamond pickaxe method
    I["Optional: Mine Obsidian with Diamond Pickaxe
- Find diamonds deep underground
- Craft diamond pickaxe
- Mine obsidian
- Build portal frame (10 obsidian)"] --> H
    
    H -->|"activated Nether Portal"| J["Entering the Nether
- Stand in portal to be transported to the Nether"]

%% Procedure to achieve Sharpness +1 in Monster Hunter Generations (-> Monster Hunter X, MHX)
flowchart TD
    A["Identify Armor Sets with Handicraft: Nargacuga, Seregios, Silver Sol (-> Monster Hunter Generations)"] -->|"armor pieces with Handicraft points"| B["Mix and Match Armor Pieces to Reach Handicraft +10"]
    B -->|"armor pieces with Handicraft points"| C["Add Handicraft Decorations (-> Gems)"]
    C -->|"armor + decorations with Handicraft points"| D["Use Handicraft Charms (-> talismans) if Available"]
    D -->|"total Handicraft points from armor, decorations, charms"| E["Check Skills on Status Screen"]
    E -->|"Handicraft +10"| F["Activate Sharpness +1"]
    F --> G["Progress to Higher-Rank Quests for Better Armor Options"]
    G -->|"materials for armor and decorations"| H["Hunt Monsters and Gather Materials"]
    H -->|"materials for crafting armor, decorations, charms"| A

%% Procedure to create Lingering Potions of Harming II in Minecraft
flowchart TD
    A["Gather Materials: Blaze Powder, Water Bottles, Nether Wart, Spider Eye, Fermented Spider Eye, Glowstone Dust, Dragon’s Breath, Brewing Stand"] -->|"Blaze Powder, Water Bottles, Nether Wart, Brewing Stand"| B["Brew Awkward Potions"]
    B -->|"Awkward Potions"| C["Brew Potions of Harming I"]
    C -->|"Potions of Harming I"| D["Upgrade to Harming II"]
    D -->|"Potions of Harming II"| E["Convert to Splash Potions of Harming II"]
    E -->|"Splash Potions of Harming II"| F["Make Lingering Potions of Harming II"]
    
    %% Detailed brewing actions
    subgraph B_details["Step 2: Brew Awkward Potions"]
        B1["Place Blaze Powder in fuel slot (-> Brewing Stand)"] --> B2["Place Water Bottles in bottom slots"]
        B2 --> B3["Place Nether Wart in top slot"]
        B3 -->|"Water Bottles"| B4["Obtain Awkward Potions"]
    end
    B -. "Awkward Potions" .-> B4

    subgraph C_details["Step 3: Brew Potions of Harming I"]
        C1["(Optional) Place Spider Eye in top slot for Poison (intermediate)"] --> C2["Skip if going directly to Harming"]
        C2 --> C3["Put a Fermented Spider Eye in the top slot over Awkward Potions"]
        C3 -->|"Awkward Potions"| C4["Brew Potions of Harming (Instant Damage I)"]
    end
    C -. "Potions of Harming I" .-> C4

    subgraph D_details["Step 4: Upgrade to Harming II"]
        D1["Place Glowstone Dust in the top slot"] -->|"Potions of Harming I"| D2["Obtain Potions of Harming II (Instant Damage II)"]
    end
    D -. "Potions of Harming II" .-> D2

    subgraph E_details["Intermediate: Make Splash Potions"]
        E1["Add Gunpowder to Potions of Harming II"] -->|"Potions of Harming II"| E2["Obtain Splash Potions of Harming II"]
    end
    E -. "Splash Potions of Harming II" .-> E2

    subgraph F_details["Step 5: Make Lingering Potions"]
        F1["Place Dragon’s Breath in the top slot"] -->|"Splash Potions of Harming II"| F2["Obtain Lingering Potions of Harming II"]
    end

%% Procedure to obtain the Titanium Sword in Terraria
flowchart TD
    A["Defeat the Wall of Flesh"] -->|"Hardmode, Pwnhammer (dropped by Wall of Flesh)"| B["Break Demon/Crimson Altars"]
    B -->|"3+ Altars broken -> Titanium Ore in worldgen"| C["Mine Titanium Ore"]
    C -->|"Titanium Ore"| D["Smelt Titanium Bars"]
    D -->|"Titanium Bars (35 Titanium Bars)"| E["Craft the Titanium Sword (-> Titanium Sword)"]
    E --> F["You now have the Titanium Sword"]

%% Procedure to become a model in BitLife
flowchart TD
    A["Start With the Right Attributes (High Looks, Good Health)"] -->|"High Looks, Good Health"| B["Graduate from High School (Age 18+)"]
    B -->|"Age 18+, High Looks maintained"| C["Start as a Foot Model (Entry-Level Gig)"]
    C -->|"Experience as Foot Model"| D["Maintain and Increase Your Fame"]
    D -->|"Growing Fame, Public Exposure"| E["Move Into Regular Modeling (Catalog/Runway Model)"]
    E -->|"Modeling Experience, Increased Fame"| F["Become a Famous Model (Fame Bar Unlocked)"]
    F -->|"Fame Bar Unlocked"| G["Get an Agent for Elite Gigs"]
    G -->|"Agent, Elite Gig Offers"| H["Attend Auditions"]
    H -->|"Successful Auditions, High Looks + Fame"| I["Keep Your Career Stable"]
    I -->|"Sustained Performance, Ongoing Fame"| J["Max Out Your Fame"]
    J -->|"Full Fame, High Income"| K["Retire Gracefully"]

%% Procedure to enable Secure Boot in BIOS/UEFI to fix Valorant's Vanguard anti-cheat errors
flowchart TD
    A["Restart PC and enter BIOS/UEFI"] --> B["Locate the Secure Boot settings"]
    B --> C["Ensure UEFI mode is enabled"]
    C -->|"UEFI boot mode"| D["Enable Secure Boot"]
    D -->|"Secure Boot (Enabled)"| E["Save and exit"]
    E --> F["Verify Secure Boot is on"]
    F --> G["Handle issues: Secure Boot grayed out or switching to UEFI from Legacy (-> convert drive from MBR to GPT, set OS Type to Windows UEFI Mode)"]

%% Early optimal boss order in Hollow Knight
flowchart TD

    B --> C["Step 3 – Defeat Vengefly King"]
    C -->|"access to Greenpath area and basic progression"| D["Step 4 – Defeat Hornet (Protector)"]
    D -->|"Mothwing Cloak (dash)"| E["Step 5 – Defeat Massive Moss Charger"]
    E -->|"dash (-> Mothwing Cloak)"| F["Step 6 – Defeat Mantis Lords"]

%% Procedure to show/record Nintendo Switch gameplay on a PC
flowchart TD
    A["Gather Your Equipment: Nintendo Switch (with dock), HDMI cable, AC adapter, USB capture card, USB cable, PC or laptop"] -->|"Nintendo Switch (with dock), HDMI cable, AC adapter"| B["Set Up the Switch Dock"]
    B -->|"HDMI cable from HDMI OUT on dock"| C["Connect to the Capture Card"]
    C -->|"HDMI cable into HDMI IN on USB capture card"| D["Connect Capture Card to PC"]
    D -->|"USB capture card connected as video device"| E["Install Software"]
    E -->|"capture card (-> USB capture card) selected as video source"| F["Start Playing (view/record/stream Switch gameplay on PC)"]

%% Escaping through the main door in "Granny" on Extreme difficulty
flowchart TD
    A["Understand the Layout: house layout and item spawn locations"] --> B["Gather Tools and Items: Padlock Key, Master Key, Hammer, Pliers, Wrench, Wire Cutters, Wooden Stake, Cogwheels (Red and Blue)"]
    B -->|"Wire Cutters"| C["Disable the Security: use Wire Cutters on door alarm and basement wires"]
    C -->|"Hammer, Pliers"| D["Remove Barricades: remove wooden planks and cut basement wires"]
    D -->|"Padlock Key"| E["Unlock the Padlock at the main door"]
    E -->|"Master Key"| F["Unlock the Door: main door fully unlocked"]
    F --> G["Distract Granny (-> Granny) with noises"]
    G --> H["Avoid Traps: bear traps and creaking floors"]
    H -->|"unlocked main door"| I["Final Steps: exit through the main door"]

%% Procedure to use a Gamertag Generator

%% Procedure to disable Quick Chat in Among Us
flowchart TD
    A["Open Among Us"] --> B["Go to the Main Menu (home screen)"]
    B --> C["Open the Settings (settings menu)"]
    C --> D["Select the 'Data' Tab"]
    D --> E["Find the 'Chat Type' Option"]
    E --> F["Change Chat Type to 'Free or Quick Chat'"]
    F --> |"Free or Quick Chat setting"| G["Confirm Your Age Setting (account age ≥ 13)"]
    G --> H["Save and Exit (close the settings)"]

%% Procedure to play 2-Player Split-Screen Mode in Fortnite
flowchart TD
    A["Prepare Your Setup: console (PS4/PS5/Xbox), one TV/monitor, two controllers"] -->|"console, TV/monitor, controllers"| B["Start Fortnite"]
    B -->|"Fortnite"| C["Sign In Player 1 (-> Player 1’s Epic Games account) and reach Lobby"]
    C -->|"second controller"| D["Connect Player 2’s Controller and Sign In (-> different account)"]
    D --> E["Join Player 1’s Lobby"]
    E -->|"Player 2 in Player 1’s Lobby"| F["Select a Game Mode (Duos or Squads)"]
    F -->|"selected game mode"| G["Start the Match (Player 1 -> host selects Ready Up)"]
    G --> H["Play Together in Split-Screen"]

%% Procedure to defeat Sans on the Genocide route in Undertale
flowchart TD
    A["Preparation before the fight: Save, stock healing items, choose equipment, get into focused mental state"] --> B["Phase 1: Opening / Early attacks"]
    B -->|"Damage dealt to Sans, Karma damage taken, memorized early patterns"| C["Phase 2: Middle escalation"]
    C -->|"More damage dealt to Sans, accumulated Karma damage, refined muscle memory"| D["Final sequence / Last attack"]
    D -->|"Survived long bullet-hell sequence, landed final hits on Sans"| E["After you defeat him: watch post-fight sequence and Genocide ending"]

    A --> F["Apply General tips and tricks throughout fight"]
    F -->|"Practice in segments, use audio cues, minimal movement, smart healing, expect resets"| B
    F -->|"Ongoing learning of patterns and timing"| C
    F -->|"Calmness and pattern memorization for final sequence"| D

    E --> G["Game proceeds to Genocide route ending"]

%% Procedure to become President in BitLife
flowchart TD
    A["Start with a Suitable Character (-> BitLife): high Smarts and Looks"] -->|"high Smarts and Looks"| B["Focus on Education: study hard, build popularity and leadership"]
    B -->|"high grades, popularity, leadership"| C["Get University Education: Political Science or similar major"]
    C -->|"university degree, extracurriculars"| D["Build a Strong Resume: graduate degree (e.g., Law School) or leadership careers (Lawyer, Business Executive)"]
    D -->|"credentials, leadership career, income"| E["Maintain Good Health and Reputation"]
    E -->|"good health, clean reputation, savings"| F["Enter Politics: run for local office (School Board Director, Mayor) and fund campaign"]
    F -->|"local office position, campaign experience"| G["Climb the Political Ladder: higher offices (Governor, Congress), save money, maintain image"]
    G -->|"political experience, funds, strong reputation, high approval ratings"| H["Run for President"]
    H -->|"Presidency (if elected)"| I["Manage your Presidency: keep approval ratings high, avoid scandals"]
    H -->|"failed presidential bid"| J["Repeat if Necessary: rebuild reputation and wealth, run again next election"]
    J -->|"improved reputation and wealth"| H

%% Money-making procedure in Stardew Valley

%% Procedure to install or repair BattlEye manually
flowchart TD
    A["Ensure Game Compatibility (game uses BattlEye)"] -->|"compatible game (uses BattlEye)"| B["Locate the BattlEye Folder in the game directory"]
    B -->|"BattlEye folder path"| C["Find the BattlEye Installer (Install_BattlEye.bat / Install_BattlEye.exe)"]
    C -->|"BattlEye installer file"| D["Run the BattlEye Installer"]
    D -->|"installation process"| E["Follow On-Screen Instructions"]
    E -->|"installed BattlEye"| F["Verify the Installation by starting the game"]
    F --> G["Update BattlEye (if necessary)"]
    F --> H["Troubleshoot Installation Issues"]
    H -->|"unresolved issues"| I["Contact Support (game’s support team or BattlEye support)"]

%% How to become an actor in BitLife without God Mode
flowchart TD
    A["Start with a high Looks stat (> 80%)"] -->|"high Looks stat"| B["Focus on your appearance"]
    B -->|"maintained/improved Looks"| C["Participate in activities (e.g., Drama Club)"]
    C --> D["Graduate High School"]
    D --> E["Apply for a job as a Voiceover Actor"]
    E -->|"job as a Voiceover Actor"| F["Work hard and get promoted"]
    F -->|"promotions to Actor, Lead Actor, Star"| H["Strive for lead roles and fame"]
    A -->|"high Looks stat"| G["Maintain your Looks and Health"]
    F -->|"ongoing acting career"| G
    G -->|"good Looks and Health stats"| H

%% Connecting a Wii to a Smart TV via different methods
flowchart TD

    %% AV (Composite) Connection
    AV1["Identify the AV (Composite) Cable (-> Wii composite AV cable)"] -->|"Wii composite AV cable"| AV2["Locate AV Inputs on the Smart TV"]
    AV2 -->|"Wii composite AV cable"| AV3["Connect the AV Cables (yellow video, red/white audio)"]
    AV3 --> AV4["Select the AV Input on the Smart TV"]
    AV4 -->|"Smart TV on AV input"| AV5["Power On the Wii and play"]

    %% Component Cable Connection
    COMP1["Obtain a Wii Component Cable"] -->|"Wii Component Cable"| COMP2["Locate Component Inputs on the Smart TV"]
    COMP2 -->|"Wii Component Cable"| COMP3["Connect Component Cables (red/blue/green video, red/white audio)"]
    COMP3 --> COMP4["Select the Component Input on the Smart TV"]
    COMP4 -->|"Wii Component Cable connection"| COMP5["Power On the Wii and adjust Wii settings for component video if needed"]

    %% HDMI Connection
    HDMI1["Purchase a Wii to HDMI Adapter"] -->|"Wii to HDMI Adapter"| HDMI2["Connect the Adapter to the Wii"]
    HDMI2 -->|"Wii to HDMI Adapter"| HDMI3["Connect an HDMI Cable between adapter and Smart TV"]
    HDMI3 --> HDMI4["Select the HDMI Input on the Smart TV"]
    HDMI4 -->|"Wii to HDMI Adapter + HDMI Cable"| HDMI5["Power On the Wii"]

    %% SCART Connection
    SCART1["Get a Wii SCART Adapter"] -->|"Wii SCART Adapter"| SCART2["Plug the AV Cables (-> Wii composite AV cable) into the SCART Adapter"]
    SCART2 -->|"SCART Adapter with AV cables"| SCART3["Connect the SCART Adapter to the Smart TV"]
    SCART3 --> SCART4["Select the SCART Input on the Smart TV"]
    SCART4 -->|"SCART connection"| SCART5["Power On the Wii and play"]

    %% S-Video Connection
    SVID1["Acquire a Wii S-Video Cable"] -->|"Wii S-Video Cable"| SVID2["Locate S-Video and Audio Inputs on the Smart TV and connect S-Video + red/white audio"]
    SVID2 --> SVID3["Select the S-Video Input on the Smart TV"]
    SVID3 -->|"S-Video connection"| SVID4["Power On the Wii"]

%% Procedure to play the Sara Sarita game
flowchart TD
    A["Gather Materials: two coins of the same denomination"] -->|"two coins"| B["Choose a Partner"]
    B --> C["Sit Opposite Each Other"]
    C --> D["Hold the Coins"]
    D -->|"coins in hand"| E["Ask for Permission: “Sara Sarita, may we join your game?” (-> Sara Sarita)"]
    E --> F["Toss the Coins"]
    F --> G["Interpret the Results: Yes / No / Maybe"]
    G -->|"Yes"| H["Proceed with Questions to Sara Sarita"]
    H -->|"questions + coin tosses"| F
    G --> I["Conclude the Game: ask “Sara Sarita, may we leave your game?” (-> Sara Sarita) and toss coins"]
    I --> J["Interpret Exit Result: need Yes to leave"]
    J -->|"Yes"| K["Ending the Game: exit the game"]
    J -->|"No or Maybe"| I

%% Procedure to create a powerful deck in Clash Royale
flowchart TD

    C -->|"support and defensive cards list"| D["Include Spells"]
    D -->|"full preliminary deck list"| E["Balance Your Elixir Cost"]
    E -->|"balanced deck (average elixir 3.0–4.0)"| F["Test and Adjust"]
    F -->|"refined deck after adjustments"| G["Adapt to the Meta"]
    G -->|"meta-adapted deck"| H["Practice and Master Your Deck"]

%% Troubleshooting a flashing blue PlayStation 5 DualSense controller
flowchart TD
    A["Check the Controller's Battery (-> DualSense controller)"] -->|"Charged DualSense controller"| B["Restart the PlayStation 5 Console"]
    B -->|"Restarted PlayStation 5 console (-> PS5)"| C["Reset the Controller (-> DualSense controller)"]
    C -->|"Reset DualSense controller connected via USB-C cable"| D["Check for Firmware Updates on PlayStation 5 console (-> PS5)"]
    D -->|"Updated system software and DualSense controller firmware"| E["Try a Different USB-C Cable"]
    E -->|"Working USB-C cable"| F["Try Connecting to Another Device"]
    F -->|"Test results (controller vs. console issue)"| G["Contact PlayStation Support"]

%% Completing the Community Center in Stardew Valley
flowchart TD
    A["Unlock the Community Center (-> Community Center)"] -->|"introduction cutscene with Mayor Lewis, access to the Community Center"| B["Investigate the Community Center (find Golden Scroll in Crafts Room)"]
    B -->|"Golden Scroll, quest to visit the Wizard"| C["Visit the Wizard (-> Wizard's Tower) to learn Junimo language"]

    C -->|"ability to read Junimo language and access bundles in rooms"| D["Complete Crafts Room Bundles"]
    C --> E["Complete Pantry Bundles"]
    C --> F["Complete Fish Tank Bundles"]
    C --> G["Complete Boiler Room Bundles"]
    C --> H["Complete Bulletin Board Bundles"]
    C --> I["Complete Vault (Gold payments)"]

    D -->|"restored Crafts Room (part of Community Center restoration)"| J["Restored Community Center (all rooms restored)"]
    E -->|"restored Pantry (part of Community Center restoration)"| J
    F -->|"restored Fish Tank (part of Community Center restoration)"| J
    G -->|"restored Boiler Room (part of Community Center restoration)"| J
    H -->|"restored Bulletin Board (part of Community Center restoration)"| J
    I -->|"Bus Repair unlocked, restored Vault (part of Community Center restoration)"| J

    J -->|"fully restored Community Center, Junimos' work complete"| K["Completion Cutscene: Pelican Town celebration and major goal of Stardew Valley achieved"]
    K -->|"completed Community Center instead of JojaMart Warehouse, bundle rewards and town benefits"| L["Enjoy ongoing benefits and rewards from completed bundles"]

%% Basic strategies and tactics to improve gameplay in Clash Royale
flowchart TD
    A["Understand Your Deck"] -->|"knowledge of cards, elixir costs, strengths, weaknesses, synergies"| B["Elixir Management"]
    B -->|"elixir advantage awareness"| C["Build a Balanced Deck"]
    C --> D["Starting Moves"]
    D -->|"initial low-risk cards and information about opponent's deck"| E["Push and Counter-Push"]
    E --> F["Placement and Timing"]
    F --> G["Defensive Strategies"]
    G --> H["Offensive Strategies"]
    H --> I["Watch Your Opponent’s Moves"]
    I -->|"information about opponent’s card cycle and play style"| J["Adjust Your Strategy"]
    J --> K["Endgame Strategy"]
    K --> L["Practice and Learn"]

%% How to play Codenames
flowchart TD
    A["Form Teams: two teams, each with a Spymaster and Field Operatives"] --> B["Prepare the Game Board: place 25 codename cards (5x5 layout)"]
    B --> C["Select a Key Card: shows team agents, neutrals, and assassin"]
    C --> |"the key card"| D["Determine Starting Team: border color indicates starting team and extra agent"]
    
    D --> E["Spymaster (of current team) Gives Clues: one-word clue + number"]
    E --> |"clue (word + number)"| F["Field Operatives Guess: discuss and choose codenames one at a time"]
    F --> |"chosen codename"| G["Reveal Codenames: Spymaster covers with team, neutral, opposing, or assassin card"]
    
    G --> H{"Is assassin revealed?"}
    H -->|Yes: assassin| I["Game ends immediately: guessing team loses"]
    H -->|No| J["Check if turn ends"]
    
    J --> K{"Turn end condition met?\n(used all guesses, stop voluntarily, or incorrect guess)"}
    K -->|No| F
    K -->|Yes| L["Switch Turns: other team repeats clue/guess/reveal process"]
    L --> E
    
    G --> M{"Has a team identified all their agents?"}
    M -->|Yes| N["Winning: that team wins the game"]
    M -->|No| J

%% Procedure to escape prison in BitLife
flowchart TD
    A["Enter Prison (-> BitLife)"] --> B["Access the Escape Mini-Game"]
    B --> C["Understand the Grid Layout and Objective"]
    C --> D["Plan Your Moves"]
    D --> E["Avoid Detection by the Guard"]
    E --> F["Navigate the Maze Using Walls"]
    F --> G["Calculate Moves and Predict Guard's Path"]
    G --> H["Strategically Use Walls to Lead Guard Away"]
    H --> I["Gradually Move to Exit"]
    I --> J["Execute the Escape (Reach Exit Door)"]
    J --> K["Life After Escape (On the Run)"]

    %% Edge labels for entities
    A -->|"incarceration status (you are in prison)"| B
    B -->|"escape mini-game grid"| C
    C -->|"knowledge of guard movement rules and exit location"| D
    D -->|"planned moves"| E
    F -->|"walls and obstacles"| G
    G -->|"predicted guard path"| H
    I -->|"clear path to exit door"| J

%% Procedure to play "There Is No Game"
flowchart TD
    A["Start the Game (-> There Is No Game) and click around"] --> B["Interact with Title Screen letters"]
    
    B --> C["Drop the 'O' in 'NO' by clicking it repeatedly"]
    C -->|"fallen 'O'"| D["Use the fallen 'O' to hit and break other letters"]
    
    D --> E["Reveal and open secret compartment to find the trophy"]
    E -->|"the trophy"| F["Use the trophy to anger the narrator further"]
    
    F --> G["Fix the Narrator's Problem: break the block with the trophy"]
    G -->|"broken block"| H["Enter new scene with the goat and locked cage"]
    
    H --> I["Get the Key: obtain a nut to trade with the squirrel"]
    
    I --> J["Create a Nut: use the trophy to knock down the tree"]
    J -->|"the nut"| K["Open the Nut by cracking it on a stone or hard surface"]
    
    K -->|"cracked nut"| L["Give the Nut to the squirrel"]
    L --> M["Receive the Key from the squirrel"]
    
    M -->|"the key"| N["Unlock the Cage to free the goat"]
    N --> O["Watch the Ending and humorous events"]
    
    O --> P["Final Messages from the narrator"]
    P --> Q["End of Game: complete 'There Is No Game'"]

%% Set a PS5 as Console Sharing and Offline Play ("primary") and use shared games
flowchart TD
    A["Sign in on target PS5 with owner PSN account (-> the PSN account that owns the games)"] --> B["(Optional) Update PS5 system software if needed"]
    B --> C["Open Settings from PS5 home screen"]
    C --> D["Select Users and Accounts"]
    D --> E["Select Other"]
    E --> F["Select Console Sharing and Offline Play"]
    F --> G["Choose Enable (set this PS5 as Console Sharing and Offline Play)"]
    G --> |"enabled Console Sharing and Offline Play on this PS5"| H["Other users on that PS5 download the owner’s games"]
    H --> |"downloaded games on that PS5"| I["Other users play games even if the console is offline (-> Offline Play)"]

%% Procedure to rob a train in BitLife
flowchart TD
    A["Meet Age Requirement (18+ in BitLife)"] -->|"eligible character"| B["Navigate to the Crime Menu"]
    B -->|"Crime menu in Activities tab (-> BitLife)"| C["Select Train Robbery"]
    C -->|"Train Robbery option selected"| D["Plan the Robbery (improve Smarts and Craziness)"]
    D -->|"planned heist & character stats"| E["Choose Your Timing and Approach"]
    E -->|"chosen timing & approach"| F["Execute the Heist"]
    F -->|"successful robbery & loot"| G["Deal with the Consequences (enjoy ill-gotten gains)"]
    F -->|"failed robbery & arrest"| H["Deal with the Consequences (prison)"]
    G -->|"experience from robbery"| I["Repeat if Necessary (attempt more train robberies)"]
    H -->|"aftermath (release from prison)"| I

%% Procedure to change display resolution on a Steam Deck (-> SteamOS)
flowchart TD
    A["Power On the Steam Deck (-> Steam Deck) and log into your account"] --> B["Press the Steam button (-> Steam Deck) to open the main menu"]
    B --> C["Select Settings from the main menu"]
    C --> D["Select Display in Settings"]

%% Ways to obtain hardwood in Stardew Valley
flowchart TD

    %% 1. Chopping Large Stumps
    A["Upgrade Axe to Copper Axe or better at the Blacksmith"] -->|"Copper Axe or better"| B["Locate Large Stumps on your farm or in the Secret Woods"]
    B -->|"Copper Axe or better"| C["Chop Large Stumps (2 hardwood per stump)"]

    %% 1. Chopping Large Logs
    D["Upgrade Axe to Steel Axe or better at the Blacksmith"] -->|"Steel Axe or better"| E["Locate Large Logs on your farm or in the Secret Woods"]
    E -->|"Steel Axe or better"| F["Chop Large Logs (8 hardwood per log)"]

    %% 2. Secret Woods
    G["Upgrade Axe to Steel Axe"] -->|"Steel Axe"| H["Remove the log blocking the path to the Secret Woods (-> Secret Woods)"]
    H --> I["Visit the Secret Woods daily"]
    I -->|"Large Stumps in the Secret Woods"| J["Chop all Large Stumps (12 hardwood per day)"]

    %% 3. Mahogany Trees - growing
    K["Gather Mahogany Seeds (from Mahogany Trees, Large Stumps, Large Logs, or slimes in the Secret Woods)"] -->|"Mahogany Seeds"| L["Plant Mahogany Seeds on your farm"]
    L --> M["(Optional) Use Tree Fertilizer to speed up growth"]
    M --> N["Wait for Mahogany Trees to fully grow"]
    N -->|"Grown Mahogany Trees"| O["Chop Mahogany Trees with any axe for hardwood"]

    %% 3. Mahogany Trees - summarized steps
    P["Gather Mahogany Seeds"] -->|"Mahogany Seeds"| Q["Plant the seeds on your farm"]
    Q --> R["Wait for the trees to grow"]
    R -->|"Grown Mahogany Trees"| S["Chop them down with any axe to get hardwood"]

    %% 4. Purchasing from Robin
    T["Visit Robin's Carpenter's Shop"] --> U["Purchase hardwood directly if available"]

    %% 5. Crates and Barrels in Mines or Skull Cavern
    V["Explore the Mines or Skull Cavern"] --> W["Break crates and barrels for a chance to find hardwood"]

    %% 6. Fishing Treasure Chests
    X["Fish at any location with a fishing rod"] --> Y["Open occasional treasure chests for a chance to find hardwood"]
